feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Route change in sales order
entry.content:
Hi @AAkash1 

Yes in standard, changing the route of a sales order can impact the confirmation dates, because the delivery scheduling uses route-dependent lead times to calculate them.

SAP Standard :

When you change the route on a sales order item, SAP triggers a re-scheduling of the item.

This happens because the route determines transit time and transportation lead times, which directly affect the delivery and goods issue dates. When you change the route, SAP recalculates these dates using the new route’s parameters. As a result, confirmed schedule lines may change, especially if availability check (ATP) is also active.

Further below points can be considered for checking

ATP Check: If ATP is enabled, the system will run a new availability check after the route is changed. This can lead to a change in confirmation quantity and/or date.

Scheduling Configuration: In customizing (IMG > Sales and Distribution > Basic Functions > Delivery Scheduling and Transportation Scheduling), the system is set to re-trigger scheduling when key fields like route are updated.

User Exit / BADI: In some cases, standard logic might be enhanced or restricted using custom logic so you can check in system if you're not seeing the standard results.

entry.title: How to do ECC field comparison with S/4hana for data load
entry.content: How to do ECC field comparison with S/4hana for data load

entry.title: CCM create intercompany cost distribution / post vendor credit memo against SO billing docs q-tities
entry.content:
Hello,

I have two questions, posting them together as wondering if 1. can be used for the purpose of 2. or not: 

1. Is there somewhere to read about the CCM contract type "create intercompany cost distribution".

2. Is there a way to post a vendor credit memo against SO billing docs quantities, so the value of the vendor credit memo is spread over proportionally to these quantities. The result should be visible in FI, so FI can trace it to the sales, the value of the credit memo once posted should contribute to the gross margin.

Thank you!

entry.title: How to enhance cats to work with PP orders
entry.content:
I have a customer that only wants to use CAT2 for all time entry.  The primary cost objects are WBS or Production Orders.  I understand CAT7 will not transfer PP order entries to controlling and an enhancement is necessary.  My question is what is the best approach? 

  • All time entries are auto approved and load to the CATSDB table in status 30.
  • WBS entries immediately create a CATSCO entry.
  • However, PP order entries do not create a CATSCO entry.
  • Is an enhance that creates the CATSCO entry the correct approach, and would CAT7 transfer to Controlling?
  • Is it better to use the BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CREATE_TT Function Module and pass the CATSDB data via an enhancement of CATA?
  • The system is S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition 2023 Initial FPS.

I'm trying to point my developer in the right direction.  Incidentally, I've working in customer system that only use CAT2 and not CO11n or CO12 for PP Order entry.  However, I'm not sure how they did it and there is no way to query.

entry.title: Customer Hierarchy In Condition Contract / delta accrual
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I am using a customer hierarchy node in a condition table for a condition contract. The accruals are generated via the normal SD F2 invoice and the customer hierarchy works fine. But when doing a delta accrual, the pricing analysis shows that the value for the customer hierarchy isnt found, while using the same condition table as in the SD invoice pricing. Any idea what the cause of this is.

entry.title: SAP FI Query
entry.content:
I m getting an error - Correct the Customizing settings for ledgers for the Universal Journal after posting the Customer invoice.

Kindly suggest

entry.title: Create Sales Order with Billing Plan through API in S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
I have a requirement to create an Sales Order with Billing plan in an external call from SAP Cloud Integration. 

For that I tried to use API_SALES_ORDER_SRV, but reading through the documentation I found the following:

"With this service, it is not possible to:...Use the following entities that are displayed on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub on the API Reference tab and the Schema View tab: Header Billing Plan, Header Billing Plan Item, Item Billing Plan, and Item Billing Plan Item."

And also the note 3440728 mentioning this feature is not available for on premise and cloud private installations and its solution is to wait for S/4HANA 2023 FPS03, but in this release documentation mention this feature is still not available(Although I'm on 2023 FPS02 so I can't verify it)

Looking for the A2A API SalesOrderBulkRequest_In, I could not find anything regarding Billing plan which, for me, means it also do not support it.

Side note is that in Public Cloud this feature is already delivered.

Having said that, what are my possibilities here? Is there another API that I can use to create these Billing Plans in Sales Orders? Maybe I can create a regular SO then append this BPs somehow.

entry.title: Statutory Reporting France Italy
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

does somebody know how to create the following french and italian financial reports in S/4HANA Finance Private Cloud?

Libro Giornale

Libro Mastro

Livre Journal Detail

Grand Livre 

Thank you very much in advance

entry.title: "No personal master record exists for person 0" occurs in APP Perform Maintenance Jobs - SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When I click on "Assign to Me" after selecting an operation in the "Perform Maintenance Job" Fiori app, I receive the following error:

"No personal master record exists for person 0"

However, please note the following:

I have a personnel number maintained for myself in PA30.

A corresponding Business Partner (BP) is also created.

My personnel number is correctly assigned to the work center associated with the operation.

Could you please advise what might be causing this error, or if there is any missing link (e.g., HR integration, user ID assignment, or infotype setup) that I should check?

and Is there any method to confirm without assign the operation to employee?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,

entry.title: Error Message FZ 376 : Error in withholding tax calculation S/4HANA
entry.content:
HI Everyone,

We have WHT activated. The WHT will be calculated at the time of Invoice posting. I posted some vendor invoices, the WHT got calculated. Now I want to pay the vendor using F110. When I do my proposal I get this Error.

"Message FZ376 - Error in withholding tax calculation". I am not sure why the program is giving such an error.

I found some SAP Notes related to version 4.6, but I would like to know if there are any correction notes applicable to S/4HANA for this issue.

Could anyone help me with this?

Regards,

FG

entry.title: Is it possible within SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public to have sales invoice approval workflows?
entry.content: We do not use sales orders but would like to have an approval workflow for approving sales invoices before they are posted. Is there a way to do this within S/4 Public cloud?

entry.title: SAP S/4 Migration
entry.content: S/4 Migration Project – insight into running parallel S/4 projects and how that impacts SAP landscapes and processes to ensure alignment and retrofit in a possible (N+2) scenario would be helpful.

entry.title: Can i publish multidimensional report with tile which own its semantic and action?
entry.content:
Hello Experts i found the different of multidimensional report between which on public cloud and private cloud. I thing on private cloud i must create multidimensional report by the app query view but not by Manage KPIs and Reports, at the last step we can share the multidimensional report by tile. But i can't set semantic and action to the tile and assigned to catalog. So i think this tile is not public tile to all user, am I right? How can i create the multidimensional report which can be used by all users?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: S4 HANA instance for presonal use
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

I'm a functional resource with 6 years of P2P experience. To develop my skillset, particularly configuration, I would like to access the full ERP suite S4 HANA (Cloud edition) for personal/training use. What are the available options for someone with their own LLC, Learning Hub account and $100/month budget?

Regards,

Ben

entry.title: Creation user in Customer hierarchy - VDH1N
entry.content:
Hello, 

in S/4 Hana how is it possible to retrieve the user creation for Customer Hierarchy? I don't see any indication of the user neither in VDH1N nor in KNVH table.

Thanks for your reply

entry.title: SPED in S4HANA Private Cloud - NACE or Output Management
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using S4HANA Private Cloud (02/2024). We want to use Output Management for printouts etc.

However, there is also business requirement to create an inbound delivery automatically from STO outbound delivery. In SAP standard output type SPED should be used for this.

But can we use SPED without NACE? Is there any SPED functionality within Output Management?

Regards,

Karolina

entry.title: BSP future in Private Cloud 2023 FPS2
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I'm just after a bit of advice and guidance regarding future state of BSPs in a Private Cloud S/4HANA 2023 FPS2 scenario.

Now the general guidance from SAP is to modernise BSPs and older UIs to Fiori apps or potentially SAP Build Apps, and I fully agree and endorse that, but our organisation has been given specific guidance that BSPs will no longer be supported in S/4HANA.

Now, I know that BSPs deployed in our PoC S/4HANA environment function perfectly fine, and that as part of the ABAP stack they currently should continue to function as intended.  BSPs can also be applied to a tile as a URL link and launched from the Fiori Launchpad.  That launchpad when federated to Work Zone SE also functions as expected.

Problem is I've not been able to locate any depreciation or sunset notification or notes (with the exception of CL_BSP_LOGIN_APPLICATION), that support the statement that BSPs will not be supported in S/4HANA, so I am after some advice from the community in case I've missed something, as I cannot find any withdrawal of support from SAP for this aging UI technology.  

Thanks in advance for any responses.

entry.title: Flexible workflow Purchase Contract Email not working
entry.content:
Hi,

I have copied below predelivered templates from maintain email templates for purchase contract but still email not working.

MM_PUR_PC_DEFAULT_TEMPLATE
MMPUR_CTR_WFL_APPROVED_EMAIL
MMPUR_CTR_WFL_REJECTED_EMAIL

could any one advise on the issue. I am using s/4 hana 2022 private cloud

regards

md

entry.title: Fiori App ''My Inbox' Enhancement Requirement
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We are looking to enhance the 'My Inbox' Fiori app for additional fields for PR and PO Approvals. We are looking for suggestions from SAP to approach this requirement.

 

Issue Details:

  1. New field will be made visible in 'My Inbox' App for PR and PO Approvals.
  2. Value for the new field will be based on data stored in SAP Tables.
  3. We need to understand the feasibility of the above requirement.
  4. If feasible what is the correct technical approach to this requirement?
  5. Are there any predefined hook up points or BADI available to make this enhancement?
  6. What are the supposed changes from ABAP and Fiori point of view?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP CO: Cost Centers CDS Extractors?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

we are currently looking for CO CDS extractors that replace the old SAPI extractors. Most extractors could have been replaced (especially master data extractors) but we can not find equivalents to the Cost Center extractors:

0CO_OM_CCA_1 ???

0CO_OM_CCA_9 ???

 

For Statistical Key Figure Items (0CO_OM_CCA_4) we have found C_StatisticalKeyFigureItem that looks quite the same as the old extractor. Statistical Key Figures - Actuals 

 

Background: Customer has SAP R/3 System, connected to BW and switches now to S/4HANA Cloud. BW should get the new data from S/4 with the same structure in order to have as minimal changes as possible in BW. Therefore we are looking for extractors with similar structure. 

 

Thanks in advance for you help!
